sglang.title: set content to empty string
sglang.author: chottolabs
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
OpenAI API server sends empty string "content": "" instead of "content": null in the first chunk containing the role
I noticed that the first response from the actual OpenAI API was different from what I got from running sglang server. I only realized this because nvim decoded it into a n

sglang.title: chore: open lto and optimization in release profile
sglang.author: ethe
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
enabling lto and codegen-units=1 will make free performance optimizations on dynamic libraries.
Modifications
rust/Cargo.toml
Checklist

 Add unit tests as outlined in the Contributor Guide.

sglang.title: Add download_dir ServerArgs property
sglang.author: pjyi2147
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Currently, Engine class does not have download_dir property, which saves the model lock file to /tmp by default causing similar issues as in vllm-project/vllm#2675
Modifications

Add download_dir property to ServerArgs class
Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide

vllm.title: [Model] Adding Support for Qwen2VL as an Embedding Model. Using MrLight/dse-qwen2-2b-mrl-v1
vllm.author: FurtherAI
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
[Model] Adding Support for Qwen2VL as an Embedding Model. Using MrLight/dse-qwen2-2b-mrl-v1

This is related to #9303 and #9759 and adds support for Qwen2VL as an embedding model. This is only a couple of lines of changes and a jinja template for the API.
I have tested that this is working correctly

vllm.title: [Core] Flashinfer - Remove advance step size restriction
vllm.author: pavanimajety
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR addresses the error when flashinfer block_tables can't be mapped to available GPU threads, leading to an error(example):
RuntimeError: multi-step: not enough threads to map block_table toFlashInfer's paged_kv_indices on GPU. Try reducing the number of seqs, increasing the block size or take

vllm.title: [Model][LoRA]LoRA support added for idefics3
vllm.author: linitra24
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
LoRA supported for inference in idefics3.
BTW, this also fixes a bug introduced in #9767, which caused the length of dummy_data to exceed the maximum model length setting.
Removed some unused code.

vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds the core code for multi-modal processor while maintaining backward compatibility. The main purpose of this PR is to "reserve" code changes (mainly related to the dependencies of multi-modal processor) to reduce the risk of merge conflicts caused by subsequent PRs.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] bitsandbytes models fail to run pipeline parallel
vllm.author: HoangCongDuc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR makes a fix so that bitsandbytes models can run pipeline parallel.
During loading bnb model weights, we need to setup the bnb quant states. However, if the model is loaded in pipeline parallel setting, some layers are PPMissingLayer instead of the actual layer, causing the error while settin

as we change to the vllm_config, out-of-tree registered models need to be updated.
we give a clear error message here for users to update.

FIX #9991
